a.xlink:title: Base exception type for errors originating in the FE library.
A required dependency is missing or failed to load.
An index is outside its valid range.
A requested operation or feature is not implemented.
Failure reported by a linear-algebra or solver backend.
Required initialization step has not been performed.
Element geometric mapping is singular or inverted.
Base exception type for errors originating in the Basis module.
Internal basis construction or transform setup failure.
Requested element topology is incompatible with the basis family.
Basis evaluation request cannot be satisfied.
Public-to-canonical node ordering or coordinate lookup failure.
